languages.text: "Я привык быть в роли наставника, и эта привычка сыграла со мной злую шутку — если замолчать и прислушаться, то можно многому научиться. У вас я научился {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}принятию и милосердию{/d}. Выживание не значит жизнь. Я утверждал, что в смерти нет смысла — это все еще так, она непостижима и беспощадна. Однако то же верно и про жизнь — смысл это что-то, что ей задаем мы сами, будь то служение {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуму{/g}, Поиск знания или создание связей крепче, чем кровь. Я сделал своим смыслом самоуничтожение через вину и ложные надежды".

traits.locale_text: "Я привык быть в роли наставника, и эта привычка сыграла со мной злую шутку — если замолчать и прислушаться, то можно многому научиться. У вас я научился принятию и милосердию. Выживание не значит жизнь. Я утверждал, что в смерти нет смысла — это все еще так, она непостижима и беспощадна. Однако то же верно и про жизнь — смысл это что-то, что ей задаем мы сами, будь то служение {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империуму{/g}, Поиск Знания или создание связей крепче, чем кровь. Я сделал своим смыслом самоуничтожение через вину и ложные надежды".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. From you I have learned {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}acceptance and mercy{/d}. Survival does not equal life. I have argued that death has no meaning — it still doesn't, it is unfathomable and merciless. However, the same is true of life — meaning is something we give it, whether it be service to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, the Quest for Knowledge, or forging bonds stronger than blood. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."
languages.original_text: "Я привык быть в роли наставника, и эта привычка сыграла со мной злую шутку — если замолчать и прислушаться, то можно многому научиться. languages.text: «Me he habituado al papel de mentor, y ello me ha pasado una cruel factura: de haber guardado silencio y escuchado, habría aprendido mucho. Usted me ha enseñado lo que son la {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}aceptación y la misericordia{/d}. Sobrevivir no es lo mismo que vivir. Yo antes creía que la muerte carece de significado; y aún opino igual, pues es insondable y despiadada. No obstante, lo mismo podría decirte de la vida. Atribuirle este significado nos corresponde a nosotros, ya sea mediante el servicio al {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, la búsqueda del conocimiento o la forja de lazos más estrechos que los de sangre. La culpa y la falsa esperanza me han llevado a darle el significado de la autodestrucción».
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. languages.text: “我已经习惯了扮演导师的角色，而这个习惯有着残酷的作用。要是我当初能闭上嘴多听一听，也许就能学到很多东西。从您身上我学会了{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}接受与怜悯{/d}。活着不等于有生命。我以前总说死亡毫无意义，现在依然这么认为，死亡深不可测且冷酷无情。但生命也一样，意义是我们自己赋予的，它可以是侍奉{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}、求知远征，也可以是缔结比血缘更牢固的羁绊。而我的生命意义，却成了在愧疚与虚假希望中自我毁灭。”
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. From you I have learned {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}acceptance and mercy{/d}. Survival does not equal life. I have argued that death has no meaning — it still doesn't, it is unfathomable and merciless. However, the same is true of life — meaning is something we give it, whether it be service to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, the Quest for Knowledge, or forging bonds stronger than blood. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."

traits.locale_text: “我已经习惯了扮演导师的角色，而这个习惯有着残酷的作用。要是我当初能闭上嘴多听一听，也许就能学到很多东西。从您身上我学会了{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}接受与怜悯{/d}。活着不等于有生命。我以前总说死亡毫无意义，现在依然这么认为，死亡深不可测且冷酷无情。但生命也一样，意义是我们自己赋予的，它可以是侍奉{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}、求知远征，也可以是缔结比血缘更牢固的羁绊。而我的生命意义，却成了在愧疚与虚假希望中自我毁灭。”

languages.text: « Mon rôle de mentor est devenu une seconde nature qui a fini par me nuire cruellement. Si j'avais daigné écouter au lieu de parler, j'aurais pu apprendre bien des choses. De vous, j'ai appris {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}l'acceptation et la miséricorde{/d}. Survivre ne veut pas dire vivre. Je soutenais que la mort n'a aucun sens et je le pense toujours, car elle est inconnaissable et sans pitié. Cependant, on peut en dire autant de la vie : c'est nous qui lui donnons un sens, que ce soit en servant l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, en poursuivant la Quête de la Connaissance ou en nouant des liens plus forts que le sang. Le sens que j'ai donné à la mienne est l'autodestruction nourrie par la culpabilité et les faux espoirs. »
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. From you I have learned {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}acceptance and mercy{/d}. Survival does not equal life. However, the same is true of life — meaning is something we give it, whether it be service to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, the Quest for Knowledge, or forging bonds stronger than blood. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."

languages.text: "Akıl hocası rolünü oynamaya alışmıştım ve bu alışkanlık bana zalimce bir kötülükte bulundu. Eğer konuşmayı bırakıp dinlemeye başlasaydım çok şey öğrenebilirdim. Sizden {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}kabullenmeyi ve merhameti{/d} öğrendim. Hayatta kalmak, yaşamakla eşdeğer değildir. Ölümün hiçbir anlamı olmadığını savundum ki hâlâ da yok. Ölüm, akıl almaz ve acımasızdır. Ancak aynısı yaşam için de geçerlidir. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'a{/g} hizmet, İrfan Arayışı veya kandan daha güçlü bağlar kurmak... Hangisi olursa olsun o anlamı biz veririz. Ben, suçluluk ve sahte umutlar aracılığıyla kendimi yok etmeyi anlam hâline getirdim."
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."

Ölüm, akıl almaz ve acımasızdır. Ancak aynısı yaşam için de geçerlidir. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'a{/g} hizmet, İrfan Arayışı veya kandan daha güçlü bağlar kurmak... languages.text: "Ich habe mich daran gewöhnt, die Rolle des Mentors zu spielen, aber diese Gewohnheit hat mir einen grausamen Bärendienst erwiesen ... hätte ich nicht geredet, sondern zugehört, hätte ich viel lernen können. Von Euch habe ich zum Beispiel {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}Akzeptanz und Gnade{/d} gelernt. Überleben ist nicht dasselbe wie Leben. Ich sagte, der Tod hätte keine Bedeutung ... das stimmt, denn er ist unausweichlich und gnadenlos. Allerdings trifft das auch auf das Leben zu ... wir sind es, die ihm einen Sinn geben, im Dienst für das {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, auf der Suche nach Wissen oder indem wir Bindungen eingehen, die stärker sind als Blut. Mein Lebenssinn ist Selbstzerstörung mittels Schuld und falscher Hoffnung."
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. From you I have learned {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}acceptance and mercy{/d}. Survival does not equal life. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."

Mein Lebenssinn ist Selbstzerstörung mittels Schuld und falscher Hoffnung."

languages.text: 「私は師の役を演じることに慣れてしまい、この習慣が私に残酷な仕打ちをした――もし私が語るのをやめて耳を傾けてさえいれば、多くを学べたでしょうに。あなたから私は、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}受容と慈悲{/d}を学びました。生き延びることは、生きることと同義ではない。私は死には意味がないと論じてきました――今もそれは変わりません。死は不可解で、無慈悲なものです。しかし、生もまた同じこと――意味とは、我々が自ら与えるものなのです。それが{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}への奉仕であれ、知識の探求であれ、血よりも固い絆を結ぶことであれ。私は、罪悪感と偽りの希望による自己破壊を、自らの意味としてしまった」
languages.original_text: "I have grown accustomed to playing the role of mentor, and this habit has done me a cruel disservice — if only I had stopped talking and listened, I could have learned a great deal. From you I have learned {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_EogunnFinalAcceptance}acceptance and mercy{/d}. Survival does not equal life. I have argued that death has no meaning — it still doesn't, it is unfathomable and merciless. However, the same is true of life — meaning is something we give it, whether it be service to the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, the Quest for Knowledge, or forging bonds stronger than blood. I have made my meaning self-destruction through guilt and false hope."
